PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?pandemic ?pandemicLabel WHERE {
  ?pandemic wdt:P31 wd:Q12184 .
  ?pandemic rdfs:label ?pandemicLabel .
  FILTER(lang(?pandemicLabel) = "en")

  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?pandemic wdt:P607 ?conflict .
    ?conflict wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q19569 .
  }
}
LIMIT 10
